risk.detail: Local topology, review, and 947-test verification are green; replacement PR and exact-main post-merge CI remain required.

destructiveChanges: Deleted only the superseded release plan after recording its incorrect instruction and adding executable archive-evidence retention assertions; Git history remains recoverable.
observedIssues: Premerge finalization originally hashed the old origin/main base instead of candidate content.
The first correction removed eager controlled-identity resolution, so PR #329 was closed unmerged rather than amending immutable v1 evidence.
The original plan instructed replacing the entire resolved-source block and therefore encoded the identity-validation regression.
The original plan-cleanup regression checked generic phrases but not the actual compacted-plan evidence.
